message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"
skinparam Actor labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"
skinparam Interface labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"
skinparam Class labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"

class Person {
    +name
    +lastname
    +NationalID
    +birth date
    +favorite food
    +favorite color
    - TellName()
    - TellAge()
    - Singing()
    - Driving()
    - Swimming()
}

@enduml
